title: Add configurable call event sampling to bound SQLite write amplification
implementation_summary: Added stdlib-only event sampling configuration constants HERMES_TPS_EVENT_SAMPLING_MODE and HERMES_TPS_EVENT_SAMPLING_RATE.
Added _EventSamplingPolicy with disabled/default lossless behavior, validated [0.0, 1.0] rates, disabled/enabled aliases, and deterministic cadence keep/drop decisions.
Added process-local event sampling kept/skipped counters and secret-safe get_event_sampling_diagnostics().
Integrated sampling after _SessionTPS.record() in _on_post_api_request so aggregate stats remain lossless before any historical persistence decision.
Added additive event_sampling metadata to get_observability_contract().
Documented operator configuration, boundary behavior, completeness semantics, and branch limitation that no SQLite call_events insertion surface exists here.

default_backward_compatibility.evidence: Default policy disabled, rate 1.0, event_history_complete true; full regression suite passed.

configurable_event_sampling.evidence: Mode aliases and rates validated by tests/test_event_sampling.py::TestConfigParsing.

lossless_session_aggregates.evidence: tests/test_event_sampling.py::TestAggregateSeparation asserted calls/tokens/TPS remain complete when sampling rate is 0.5.

bounded_hook_path_overhead.evidence: Decision logic is in-memory cadence over process-local counter, stdlib-only, no SQLite reads or random.random().

sampled_history_metadata.evidence: get_observability_contract()["event_sampling"] includes mode, rate, strategy, event_history_complete, aggregate_tps_lossless, diagnostics, and env vars.

skipped_event_counts_privacy_safe.evidence: get_event_sampling_diagnostics() and contract diagnostics expose kept/skipped counts only; privacy tests assert no raw session/model/provider identifiers.

configuration_edge_tests.evidence: tests/test_event_sampling.py covers disabled/default, aliases, invalid values, 0.0/1.0 boundaries, deterministic cadence, metadata, privacy, and concurrency.

verification_commands.result: completed; her-6od remains in progress before close, no blockers reported
recoverable workspace health warning: database disk image malformed in events table; stale .beads/.write.lock; db.write_probe succeeded. Recorded as workflow hygiene warning.

known_warnings: No historical SQLite call_events insertion surface exists on this branch; sampling gate is implemented as policy/counters/metadata and documented for a future insertion seam.
br doctor reports a recoverable pre-existing beads DB integrity anomaly unrelated to source verification.
